title: Claude Fable 5 is here!
summary: YouTube video reviewing Claude Fable 5 (also referred to as Claude Mythos 5), comparing it to GPT 5.5. The review demonstrates capabilities in tasks including ray tracing, earth simulation, 3D reconstruction, music composition, cancer classification, and chemistry instruction.
writeup: AI Search reviews Claude Fable 5 (also referred to as Claude Mythos 5) and benchmarks it against GPT 5.5. The review runs the model through a spread of tasks: ray tracing, earth and world simulation, 3D reconstruction, music composition, cancer classification, and chemistry instruction. The aim is to show how the new release handles technical, scientific, and creative work side by side with a competing model.
